title: Harry Potter Electronic Chess Board Game. GoChess Mini Wizard. Light-Up Chess Set for Adults & Kids. All Skill Levels & Online Play App for Harry Potter Fans Smart Board Games Lovers
features: HARRY POTTER CHESS SET: Premium, Sleek Wizard’s Chess pieces inspired by the iconic giant chess scene. A display‑worthy collectible that brings true movie magic to your home.
SMART LIGHT COACHING: Real-time colorful light indications provide instant feedback and guidance for each move, helping you learn and improve your play. Great for all levels players.

PLAY VS THE SMART BOARD: Advanced chess bot with 32 difficulty levels, catering to all skill levels. Challenge yourself, practice, and improve your skills with a responsive and intelligent opponent on an electronic chessboard.
PLAY ONLINE: Always find a match ready for you. Play online with friends, or new opponents worldwide. GoChess supports Lichess and Chess.com, the biggest global community platforms for chess players.

PLAY TOGETHER: No matter experience or skills, GoChess enables players of different levels (and generations) to enjoy and play together. Choose the assistance level needed for each player. Keep every match fun, educational, and competitive.

PORTABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: GoChess Wizard Mini is a standard size (35mm x 35mm square size), easy to carry and set up, making it ideal for playing at home, in the office, or anywhere. The compact design ensures you can enjoy a game of chess wherever you are.
WHAT’S IN THE BOX: Premium GoChess Wizard Mini board, complete chess piece set, two pouches for pieces, mobile device stand, and USB charging cable.
PERFECT GIFT FOR HARRY POTTER FANS & CHESS LOVERS: The smartest way to relive Wizard’s Chess magic. Ideal for holidays, birthdays, and special displays.
description: Product Description Play Anywhere, Challenge Anyone Play Online Play against anyone, anywhere, directly from your board. Connect your Lichess or Chess.com account to always find a match that fits your skill. Play VS the Smart Board Challenge your skills against the advanced system with 32 difficulty levels. Play against the intelligent opponent who is always there for you. Play Together Keep every match fun, educating, and competitive no matter age or skills. Play together with a personalized assistance level for each player. Learn with Daily Puzzles Solve daily chess puzzles to hone your skills and practice strategic positions. Previous page Next page The Perfect Gift Crafted with Premium Harry Potter design Previous page Next page
